tasks.dependencies: Estimates peak resource usage from row-count metadata before compute
Resource-intensive in-memory computation, historically prone to exhaustion
Checks actual peak usage against budget mid-run/post-run
Branch: resource usage within safe budget
Branch: near resource ceiling, reroutes to chunked processing

operator_config.sql: SELECT 1 AS autorca_probe, 'RTL_SUP_RES' AS dag_id, 'load_target' AS task_name;

tasks.dependencies: Logs final resource profile for trend monitoring

incident.description: Resource Exhaustion incident on the Suppliers pipeline (RTL_SUP_RES): warehouse slotting-optimization solver exhausts memory.
incident.symptoms: The nightly warehouse slotting-optimization solver (a mixed-integer optimization model) exhausts available memory on 2-3 nights per month, correlating with higher SKU-location combination counts.
incident.root_cause: The solver builds its full constraint matrix in memory for all SKU-location pairs at once; growth in warehouse footprint (new mezzanine level added) pushed the combination count past the point the current memory allocation can hold.
incident.business_impact: On exhaustion, next-day picking uses a stale slotting plan, measurably reducing picker travel-time efficiency for that shift (estimated 8-12% productivity loss).
incident.resolution: Decompose the solver problem by warehouse zone, solving sub-problems in sequence or parallel with bounded memory each, then reconcile boundary constraints in a lightweight final pass.

expected_rca.expected_rca_summary: AI AutoRCA should identify: The solver builds its full constraint matrix in memory for all SKU-location pairs at once; growth in warehouse footprint (new mezzanine level added) pushed the combination count past the point the current memory allocation can hold.
expected_rca.evidence_required: Airflow task logs, Datadog infrastructure/application metrics, JIRA/Confluence RAG context for known-issue matching
expected_rca.airflow_logs: Airflow task failure logs (on bad nights) show OOMKilled correlated with a memory-usage metric that had been trending up for weeks
expected_rca.datadog_metrics: Datadog container.memory.usage shows a clear upward trend correlated with warehouse footprint growth, not a sudden spike
expected_rca.resolution: Decompose the solver problem by warehouse zone, solving sub-problems in sequence or parallel with bounded memory each, then reconcile boundary constraints in a lightweight final pass.
expected_rca.preventive_action: Add solver-problem-size forecasting (based on SKU-location combination count) to the metadata model, auto-flagging when a DAG's problem size trend approaches its allocated resource ceiling.
